name: rockstarr-outreach-interceptly
description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients on Interceptly. Owns the Interceptly integration end-to-end: account discovery, persona capture, campaign lifecycle (draft, launch, pause, stop), multi-account daily inbox + tasks loop, per-reply send / label / follow-up / booking, and outreach metrics + weekly reports. Every inbound reply routes through rockstarr-reply for drafting and operator approval before sending.
